notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11: founded Jan 6, 1921 (first unit: فوج موسى الكاظم), declared official holiday by Iraqi Cabinet decision Dec 31, 1945.
Key nuance included: holiday not observed in Kurdistan Region (confirmed via kurdistan24.net independent source).
Avoided political analysis of the army's historical role (coups, political interference) per neutral-framing rule — stuck to founding facts and holiday status only.
Single-country event (_countryCode: iq), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
